reviews.review_description: An amazing game I love the detail that went into it they can add a few more things either at a servant more levels more items to fix more paints different types of equipment would be cool but overall the game is amazing I have played several times recommended to everybody I come across
This game needs more levels this is a amazing game and give me things to do but after doing all the packs like 5 times gets quite boring but i do suggest this game

I love it, but once you unlock more equipment and stuff, it does take some of the fun out of the game. It feels a bit too easy, so I’d really appreciate if you did an add-on pack that is harder and takes more work (for the players to finish said add on). Overall I really do think it’s a great game. I’ve been playing for around a year, and I really really recommend it!

I appreciate all the work you guys have put into this, keep going cause I think you guys have the next big game :)

I was playing until I got to a certain level into the game where I did all the work it glitched and it took me almost an hour to do because it kept bugging out but when I was finally done it would not let me continue and then I tried to request a refund but since I played other levels for another hour and played for more than 2 hours which means I couldn't get a refund. So I wasted $13 and 2 hours of my time for nothing. Everything else is fine though. 😐

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thanks for sharing your feedback. 
We understand how frustrating it can be to lose progress due to a bug. If you’d like, you can join our Discord to share more details about what happened – your input really helps us understand the player experience and any issues more clearly.

~VR Factory

Thanks for letting us know; it really helps us understand what players are experiencing! 🔧

reviews.review_title: A Good game with some bugs
reviews.review_description: Placing items on silver tray on work bench has a 50% chance of not letting you pick up items on it. You can by pass my crouching than reaching over. The controllers aren’t 1:1 with the hands, but it’s forgivable. Some inconsistencies with language, but nothing awful. Uses AI voice for tutorials, not a fan at all, but can be muted. Plastic cleaner button doesn’t work, just try to move hand THROUGH the machine to activate. Painting some commission’s are impossible due to collisions with hands. Do not listen to “1 star minimum to pass”, game will fail you if you don’t 100% all aspects. But overall, it’s slow, it’s enjoyable, it’s easy to navigate and will most likely improve over time.

Like the game. But get almost done and won’t let me finish the project. Tried to start over on projects and same result. Please fix. Spent so much time on certain projects and cannot finish them. Like the screws won’t go back in on the mailbox.
I really love this game, nothing bad to say, i just wish they would make more levels. More things to do. I've had it forever just waiting for new levels and more tools and stuff to buy.

this game is an absolute blast! This is exactly what you'd watch on youtube and that you are able to do what exactly they do. I can't wait until there are more antiques to fix in this extremely fun game cause I'm itching to fix way more stuff.
Can you add multiplayer pleaseeeeeeeeeeee
I love this game and it is amazing

This game is phenomenal, it's everything I hoped for, spending hours in my virtual workshop with all the tools beautifully laid out, restoring all sorts of items. I think the potential is unlimited, maybe a sandbox mode in the next release where you get to actually build some stuff with raw material 😊

I might be dreaming but that's how much I'm excited about this title!! Kudos to the devs for a job very well done!!!
I need the game to be able to save and easyer money

reviews.review_title: A great way to relax and unwind
reviews.review_description:
I use this game to relax, I enjoy taking something beat up looking and restoring it. The only thing I wish is that when you receive an item with a design on it there was a way to maybe stamp the design, so it shows after painting, as paint just covers everything. Also give the sponges more cleaning time before they have to be sprayed again, cleaning was very tedious until I got the water sprayer.

EDIT: Just wanted to thank the devs for adding smaller paintbrushes! Now you can add fine details to the items!
It's a fun game but i want more levels
It a good game I just wish the items were cheaper
Great game but would like more content

reviews.review_title: The game is good, but with some problems
reviews.review_description: The game is good, but not having a checkpoint or some kind of save makes some missions a little frustrating, having to either finish them in a hurry or having to leave the middle of the game and come back having to do everything again, and I have a very annoying bug where the screws don't tighten, they get stuck in one position and you can't do anything except restart the game, and since there is no kind of checkpoint this makes this bug very frustrating, I hope this is fixed soon.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! :)
We’re sorry to hear about the issues you’ve encountered. For bug reports, we warmly invite you to join our Discord — we’ll do our best to investigate the problem and pinpoint its cause together. 
Your report will help us improve the game!

~VR Factory Team

reviews.review_title: I'd like to play it sitting
reviews.review_description:
It's not possible to play this game in a sitting position (unlike in the game description). I can't reach anything if I sit on a sofa :(
It would be nice to be able to save my current progress. If I'm in the middle of repairing a toy and I need to leave the game, when I come back I have to restart the work.
Another nice feature will be a gallery of our finished commisions, with different paint colors used etc.

developer_response.body:
Hi,

Thank you for your feedback. ;)

Our production department will look into the matter to see if there is anything else we can do to improve seated play.

Any other suggestions will also be considered.
In the meantime, please feel free to visit our discord to exchange feedback and share other game development ideas.

~VR Factory Team

reviews.review_title: Great game but needs some updates
reviews.review_description:
For context I am playing on stand-alone Quest 3.

This game is a hidden gem…if you like watching videos of restoration projects, or you do it yourself, this game is for you!

The graphics are pretty amazing looking for standalone, no complaints there. Every item looks pretty realistic and no graphical issues seen. Shading is very nice also.

I have completed the first pack and moved to the second. For the drink coasters restoration, one of the small pegs was not completing 100% even with nothing showing using the LT to detect dirt or paint. I will try it again but did not allow me to compete the mission and get the money.

Painting with the brush given to you by default…is the best option. I bought the medium brush, and it’s very uncomfortable to use and barely puts any paint on a surface. 

Painting with your hand is neat, but the hand tracking needs improvements. The collision detection of the brush and part being painted, is slightly wonky and takes the realism of painting, out. As of now the default brush does the best job at covering an area and gives the closest to realistic experience of painting, even with the wonk.

The tray…no offense but the tray is a nuisance lol I move it every game I load up and far away from my workbench. Maybe an option to not have it? Why I dislike it? Everytime I put parts on it to organize and the go to grab the part…even if the part is highlighted somehow the tray gets grabbed. Luckily, you guys have it so the parts do not fly around or off the tray once on it…but man I don’t like the tray hahaha 

Other than the few things mentioned that I hope get some much needed tweaks…this game is a ton of fun and so glad we get something to cure the restoration addiction lol

reviews.review_title: Parts fly away and can't be found
reviews.review_description: Sometimes parts get stuck touching each other and eventually fly around the room. Now I can't find someone birdhouse pieces and can't reassemble it.

reviews.review_title: Everything’s There - Just Needs a Polish
reviews.review_description:
Conceptually, think PowerWash Simulator meets Car Mechanic Simulator… this game works, and it does it pretty well, for the most part.

There is some “jank” and bugs that need to be worked on, but nothing that stopped me from coming back to restore all the items. A bit more content appears to be getting worked on so hopefully that includes more Commissions, not just cosmetics and decorations. Either way,  I recommend this title even in its current state.

Dev Team- Great work on this project & hope to see what’s in the works! If I could make a suggestion, perhaps making a Jobs feature where a random item (from the Commissions list) is requested for cleaning. The incentive is that it has a slightly higher payout, but the state of all the parts (cleaning, polishing , etc.) is randomized and the requester has a specific paint color preference.
You can’t save your progress! If you “save” in the middle of a project, when you come back, you still have to start the project all over again! Makes you not want to begin another.

developer_response.body:
Hi,

We are sorry to hear that auto save brings you such a negative perception of our game. We will pass the feedback to the production department and see if we would be able to change something to make your perception better. 

~VR Factory Team

reviews.review_description: Non-VR version has a heartwarming storyline w/ cutscenes which gives more purpose to the game. I was bored after the first restoration, thinking, "That's it?" But if you actually like mindlessly restoring stuff just because you can... You'll love it.

Really enjoying it. Not overly complicated but definitely gets challenging. I just finished the birdhouse and just WOW. I found that to be great fun. That is as far as I got, but am going back for more. I just had to stop to write a review!  The detail and numerous tools to work with is very nice. Hope to see many more projects in the future. Great job!

reviews.review_title: Wow not what I was expecting!
reviews.review_description: My favorite VR genre lately has been what I call the working Sim genre and this 💎 fits nicely in that category, with games like dig VR, power washing simulator and lawn mowing simulator to name a few.  It is a solid experience and will most likely get even better with future development.  These devs also brought us, bartender simulator and zombie bar.  All are fun titles and are worth playing.  I think this might be their best yet tho.  If you're into the simulation genre this is an obvious choice.  Great job devs, keep up the great work👍

developer_response.body:

– Team VR Factory Games

reviews.review_description: After a long day at work, I love to unwind with simulation games, and Workshop Simulator VR is the perfect example of this genre done right. It sets a calm and relaxing mood, allowing you to forget everyday duties and fully immerse yourself in the role of a workshop owner. Game presents eight main missions, where every mission contains three items whats gives 24 items to restoration in total. Considering that items are different in terms of appearance and complexity, it requires at least of 10 hours of gameplay to fully finish the game. I think it is a nice result for VR title. From technical point of view, I didn't notice any bugs. Performance and optimization is very good.

developer_response.body: WOW. Sounds like a review by a professional. Thank you for appreciating our game and noticing so many positives. 24 items to be restored is just the beginning :) Best VR Factory Team
